title: muhlenbergia macrotis
intro: Muhlenbergia macrotis, also known as bigtop muhly grass, is a type of flowering plant in the family Poaceae. This plant is native to the southwestern United States and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Muhlenbergia macrotis are said to include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for use in traditional medicine.
